title: Title
author: Author
name: Name
forceHTTPSDesc: Redirect all HTTP requests to HTTPS when enabled (recommended for production)
footerContentPlaceholder: Supports HTML. Leave empty to hide.
footerContentHelp: Supports HTML. Leave empty to hide.
contentDefaultImagesHelp: When a video has no cover or speaker has no avatar, the default assets configured here will be used. Galleries prefer uploaded cover images or the first image.
registrationEnabledDesc: Allow new users to self-register (activation by admin required after registration)
cookieSecureDesc: Enable Secure Cookie for HTTPS environments (recommended for production)
issuerURLHelp: OIDC provider's Issuer URL, used for auto-discovery
secretSetHint: Already set, leave empty to keep unchanged
clientSecretPlaceholderSet: Leave empty to keep existing secret unchanged
idpMetadataURLHelp: SAML IdP Metadata URL. System will automatically parse Entity ID, SSO URL and certificate
spMetadataHelp: Provide the address below to your IdP administrator to import this system configuration:
spSigningConfigHelp: Some IdPs require SP to sign AuthnRequest. AuthnRequestsSigned will be true in metadata when configured.
privateKeyEncryption: Private key is stored with AES-256-GCM encryption
nameIDFormatHelp: Select the NameID format returned by IdP
attributeMappingHelp: Map IdP attributes to system fields. Leave empty to use default mapping. Key is IdP attribute name, value is system field name (username/email/name).
sensitiveInfoNote: Sensitive information (such as Client Secret, Private Key) is stored with AES-256-GCM encryption
socialAccountsPlaceholder:
One per line, format: key=value
e.g. github=alice
socialAccountsFormatError: Invalid social account format. Use key=value per line
categoryDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the category "{name}"? Deletion is not possible if there is content under this category.
secretKeyPlaceholderSet: Leave empty to keep existing secret unchanged
publicURLHelp: Used only for public access mode. If private distribution is configured below, the system will prefer the distribution domain over this.
corsOriginHelp: Allowed browser cross-origin upload sources, one per line. S3 bucket CORS rules will be configured automatically on save.
distributionDomainHelp: Public domain for resource access. Private distribution and image styles are applied through this domain.
privateAccessHelp: When enabled, access expiry and signature will be appended to distribution URLs.
urlTTLSecondsHelp: Private distribution URL expiry in seconds.
privateDistributionNote: To use image styles with private objects, configure qiniu distribution domain and keep bucket private. The system will reuse Access Key / Secret Key above to sign distribution URLs. Frontend accesses signed distribution URLs rather than S3 X-Amz temporary download URLs.
imageStyleHelp: Query string appended directly to image URLs. Do not include `?`. Should be used with distribution domain and private access policy above.
secretKeyStorageNote: Sensitive information (such as Secret Key) is stored with AES-256-GCM encryption
wechatSyncDesc: Sync all departments and users from WeChat Work to the system, including organizational structure, names, mobile numbers, avatars, etc.
syncFailed: Sync failed. Please check WeChat Work configuration
syncInstructionsList: Click sync to fetch all departments and users from WeChat Work; Department info includes: name, parent department; User info includes: name, email, mobile, avatar, department; New users are created automatically, existing users are updated; Ensure WeChat Work is configured correctly above
appSecretPlaceholderSet: Leave empty to keep existing secret unchanged
confirmDeleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
searchPlaceholder: Search username, name, email or mobile...
socialAccountsFormatError: Invalid social account format. Use key=value per line
